archetype.name: Local Experiences
archetype.description: Restaurants, bars, gyms, studios, salons, tours, classes, and venues where geography and timing dominate the decision.
archetype.promptEmphasis: Acquisition is the strongest intent — buyers are ready to book; situated and constrained queries encode party size and occasion.

declarative: What is {topicName} and why is it the thing you do at {category} places?
How does {attribute1} differ from {attribute2} in {category} venues?
What should a first-timer know before going to a {category} for {topicName}?
How does {topicName} usually work at a {category}, step by step?
What's the etiquette at a {category} for {topicName}?
comparative: What's the difference between {attribute1} and {attribute2} {category} spots?
Walk-in {category} vs reservation-required {category} for {topicName} — which fits {context}?
Full-service vs counter-service {category} — which is actually better for {topicName}?
Chef-driven {category} vs neighborhood {category} — what are you paying for?
Early-seating vs late-seating at {category} for {topicName} — which gives you the better experience?
situated: As a {persona} new to the area, what should I understand about {category} before booking {topicName}?
